description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with the default stages (build, test, deploy) and two jobs that run in the test stage. Add an argon job that uses the node:argon Docker image and executes the shell commands "npm i" then "npm t". Add a boron job that uses the node:boron Docker image and executes the same commands "npm i" then "npm t". Both jobs run on any branch and have no caches, artifacts, or special rules defined.
